# Data Model: Add Telemetry for Ticket Source on Compare

**Feature Branch**: `AIB-138-add-telemetry-for`
**Date**: 2026-01-04

## Entity Changes

### TelemetryContextFile (Extended)

**Location**: `specs/$BRANCH/.telemetry-context.json`
**Type**: JSON file (generated by workflow, consumed by compare command)

#### Current Schema

```typescript
interface TelemetryContextFile {
  generatedAt: string;              // ISO timestamp
  tickets: Record<string, TicketTelemetry>;
}
```

#### Extended Schema

```typescript
interface TelemetryContextFile {
  generatedAt: string;              // ISO timestamp
  sourceTicket: string;             // NEW: Source ticket key (e.g., "AIB-138")
  tickets: Record<string, TicketTelemetry>;
}
```

#### Field Details

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `generatedAt` | string (ISO 8601) | Yes | Timestamp when telemetry was fetched |
| `sourceTicket` | string | Yes (NEW) | Ticket key extracted from BRANCH env var |
| `tickets` | Record<string, TicketTelemetry> | Yes | Telemetry keyed by ticket key |

### TicketTelemetry (Unchanged)

Reused for source ticket with same structure.

```typescript
interface TicketTelemetry {
  ticketKey: string;
  inputTokens: number;
  outputTokens: number;
  cacheReadTokens: number;
  cacheCreationTokens: number;
  costUsd: number;
  durationMs: number;
  model: string | null;
  toolsUsed: string[];
  jobCount: number;
  hasData: boolean;
}
```

## State Transitions

N/A - No state machine changes. The telemetry context file is generated once per compare command execution.

## Validation Rules

| Rule | Field | Constraint |
|------|-------|------------|
| VR-001 | sourceTicket | Must match regex `^[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+$` |
| VR-002 | sourceTicket | Must exist as a key in `tickets` object |
| VR-003 | tickets[sourceTicket] | May have `hasData: false` if no completed jobs |

## Example Instance

### With Source Ticket Having Data

```json
{
  "generatedAt": "2026-01-04T12:00:00.000Z",
  "sourceTicket": "AIB-138",
  "tickets": {
    "AIB-138": {
      "ticketKey": "AIB-138",
      "inputTokens": 25000,
      "outputTokens": 12000,
      "cacheReadTokens": 5000,
      "cacheCreationTokens": 2000,
      "costUsd": 0.0789,
      "durationMs": 28000,
      "model": "claude-sonnet-4-5-20251101",
      "toolsUsed": ["Edit", "Read", "Write"],
      "jobCount": 2,
      "hasData": true
    },
    "AIB-124": {
      "ticketKey": "AIB-124",
      "inputTokens": 35000,
      "outputTokens": 18000,
      "cacheReadTokens": 8000,
      "cacheCreationTokens": 3000,
      "costUsd": 0.1023,
      "durationMs": 33000,
      "model": "claude-sonnet-4-5-20251101",
      "toolsUsed": ["Edit", "Read", "Write", "Bash"],
      "jobCount": 3,
      "hasData": true
    }
  }
}
```

### With Source Ticket Having No Data

```json
{
  "generatedAt": "2026-01-04T12:00:00.000Z",
  "sourceTicket": "AIB-140",
  "tickets": {
    "AIB-140": {
      "ticketKey": "AIB-140",
      "inputTokens": 0,
      "outputTokens": 0,
      "cacheReadTokens": 0,
      "cacheCreationTokens": 0,
      "costUsd": 0,
      "durationMs": 0,
      "model": null,
      "toolsUsed": [],
      "jobCount": 0,
      "hasData": false
    },
    "AIB-124": {
      "ticketKey": "AIB-124",
      "inputTokens": 35000,
      "outputTokens": 18000,
      "cacheReadTokens": 8000,
      "cacheCreationTokens": 3000,
      "costUsd": 0.1023,
      "durationMs": 33000,
      "model": "claude-sonnet-4-5-20251101",
      "toolsUsed": ["Edit", "Read", "Write", "Bash"],
      "jobCount": 3,
      "hasData": true
    }
  }
}
```

## Database Changes

**None** - This feature only modifies a generated JSON file. No Prisma schema changes required.

## Backward Compatibility

| Aspect | Compatible | Notes |
|--------|------------|-------|
| Existing consumers | Yes | `sourceTicket` field is additive; existing code ignores unknown fields |
| TypeScript types | Yes | Interface extension maintains compatibility |
| Test files | Update required | Add tests for `sourceTicket` field validation |
